cognitive.$description: Primitive values for cognitive accessibility mode. These provide the building blocks for larger touch targets, enhanced readability, and reduced visual complexity. Based on WCAG 2.2 Target Size (Level AAA) and cognitive accessibility best practices.

touchTargetMin.$description: Minimum interactive touch/click target size — WCAG 2.2 Success Criterion 2.5.5 Target Size (Enhanced, Level AAA). Android Material 3 also specifies 48dp minimum.

focusRingWidth.$description: Enhanced focus ring width for improved visibility in cognitive mode (default is 2px).

focusRingOffset.$description: Enhanced focus ring offset for improved visibility in cognitive mode (default is 2px).

borderWidth.$description: Enhanced border width for clearer element boundary definition.

maxChoicesPerGroup.$description: Maximum number of options/choices presented in a single group or menu. Follows Miller's Law (7±2) with a conservative bound for cognitive load reduction.
